description: Create a sales quotation for 'Aurora Dynamics Inc.' with an expiration date set to 30 days from today. The quotation must include two sections: 'Workstation Equipment' containing 20 units of 'Ergonomic Standing Desk - Bamboo Top', 20 units of 'Premium Mesh Task Chair', and the note 'All workstation items include standard 2-year warranty'; and 'Technology & Peripherals' containing 25 units of '15-inch Business Laptop i7', 25 units of 'Wireless Ergonomic Mouse', and the note 'Technology items subject to separate IT support agreement'. Save the quotation in Draft state.
